mean_change.description: The mean change in cholesterol level (mmol/L) that the study aims to detect, used as the effect size in the sample size formula.

standard_deviation.description: The assumed standard deviation (mmol/L) of the change in cholesterol level, used in the sample size calculation.

power.description: The desired statistical power (80%), corresponding to z₀.₈ = 0.84 used in the sample size formula.

alpha.description: The significance level (two-sided), corresponding to z₀.₉₇₅ = 1.96 used in the sample size formula.
